header: Edit your site where your visitors see it
subheadline: With Visual Editor support, Desiderio turns the frontend itself into the editing surface.
content:
Click any of the 255 elements right on the page and change it inline — no module-hopping, no preview-tab roulette. What your editors see is literally what ships.

  • Inline editing across all 255 themed elements
  • Backend previews in the page module as the fallback
  • One seeder command for a full demo site to practice on

media.title: Editing in the Desiderio Visual Editor
media.alternative: TYPO3 Visual Editor with inline editing of a Desiderio content element on the page.
media.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
